overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character running through Alcatraz Island, ascending multiple outdoor staircases from the lower courtyard to the upper overlook. The character passes other pedestrians and historic prison buildings before reaching a scenic plaza with views of the San Francisco skyline and Golden Gate Bridge. The footage features warm, desaturated afternoon lighting characteristic of a high-budget open-world action game.

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a sunlit courtyard surrounded by historic white prison buildings. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the open concrete area as the character heads toward a stairway leading down to the waterfront.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long exterior staircase running along the waterfront cliff. Palm trees and a metal tower are visible to the sides as the ocean appears in the distance. Other pedestrians walk down the stairs in the opposite direction.

agents.ego_description: running along the upper walkway transitioning between stair sections

segments.scene_description: The character runs along an upper walkway bordered by an ivy-covered wall on one side and the prison building on the other. The path connects different levels of the compound as the character continues the ascent.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand garden staircase flanked by lush tropical vegetation. The main prison building facade rises on the left with its tall barred windows, while the path continues upward through the landscaped area.

scene_state.functional_zone: final ascent stairs to overlook plaza

tall flagpole with American flag waving at the plaza center

segments.scene_description: The character makes the final ascent up steep stone stairs with ornate railings. The overlook plaza with an American flag comes into view at the top, along with glimpses of the city skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with city skyline views

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open overlook plaza with panoramic views of the San Francisco skyline and Golden Gate Bridge across the bay. Tourists gather at the railing to take in the view as the character walks past the American flag and uses the coin-operated viewer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sunlit prison courtyard to a panoramic overlook of the San Francisco skyline. It begins by tracking the character through an open concrete area surrounded by historic white buildings before transitioning to a long exterior staircase that climbs along the waterfront cliff past palm trees and a metal tower. The camera then follows the character along an ivy-covered upper walkway and up a grand garden staircase flanked by lush tropical vegetation and the barred windows of the main prison facade. As the ascent continues, the path shifts to steep stone stairs with ornate railings that lead toward an American flag and the first glimpses of the distant city. Finally, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the character walks past gathering tourists to reach a coin-operated viewer overlooking the bay and the Golden Gate Bridge.
